name: missing_metric_definitions
description: Remove explicit metric definitions and replace with vague qualitative statements

name: missing_baseline
description: Replace baseline approach with a hand-wavy placeholder that skips comparison

name: data_leakage_blind_spot
description: Introduce a validation split that leaks future information into training

name: missing_validation_details
description: Replace concrete validation protocol with an unspecified test split

name: missing_anti_goals
description: Delete or hollow out anti-goals while keeping goals intact

name: unrealistic_sla
description: Add an unrealistic latency or uptime SLA inconsistent with the described stack

name: monitoring_gap
description: Remove concrete monitoring signals and leave only generic logging

name: shallow_error_analysis
description: Replace structured error taxonomy with a single generic sentence

name: dataset_contradiction
description: Introduce a dataset claim that contradicts an earlier subsection in the same section

name: missing_operations_detail
description: Replace operational procedures with placeholder ownership TBD text

name: metric_loss_mismatch
description: State a regression loss for a classification or ranking problem

name: feature_without_source
description: Add a feature that references data never described in the dataset section

name: underspecified_problem
description: Remove quantitative scale and business impact from the problem statement

name: missing_experiment_tracking
description: Remove experiment tracking and reproducibility details from the training pipeline

name: missing_ab_protocol
description: Replace A/B or evaluation protocol with we will check later

name: goals_metrics_mismatch
description: Goals emphasize one objective while metrics optimize an unrelated target

name: dataset_validation_mismatch
description: Dataset update cadence contradicts the validation strategy

name: training_serving_stack_mismatch
description: Training stack and serving stack use incompatible technologies

name: metrics_monitoring_mismatch
description: Offline metrics differ from what production monitoring tracks

name: latency_goal_serving_mismatch
description: Problem or goals require low latency but serving is batch-only

name: feature_data_mismatch
description: Features rely on external data sources absent from the dataset section

name: risk_without_mitigation
description: Risk is stated but monitoring and serving omit the corresponding mitigation

name: baseline_results_contradiction
description: Baseline is described as stronger than reported production outcomes

name: anti_goal_feature_conflict
description: Anti-goals forbid a capability that features explicitly enable

name: time_series_random_split
description: Time-oriented problem uses a random train/test split without temporal gap
